generation.promptHintZh: TOEFL 2026 Listening pilot. Original short spoken prompt or mini-dialogue, followed by one selected-response item asking for the best response. No real ETS text. Draft only until audio is produced and reviewed.

qualityRules: 100% original; use official TOEFL task style only as structure guidance.
The correct response must be natural, contextually appropriate, and uniquely best.
Distractors must be plausible but violate tone, purpose, timing, or stated facts.
Draft only until stable audio is generated and reviewed.
